task_board.py and session_tools.py need fix
[BUG] _backfill_fts() was the actual root cause — not FTS5 itself. It ran 1648 INSERTs on every init when schema_version failed to persist. 14 MCP processes × 1648 rows = permanent deadlock. Previous
[WORKED] sqlite_master fast path — zero exclusive locks for 47/48 processes. Direct SQLite bypass when MCP layer was locked. WAL+SHM deletion to break stale lock state.
mycelium should route task_board through HTTP to VETKA API (like vetka_mcp_bridge already does) instead of opening its own SQLite connection. Single writer = zero lock contention permanently.
mycelium should route task_board through HTTP to VETKA API (like vetka_mcp_bridge already does) instead of opening its own SQLite connection. Single writer = zero lock contention permanently.

_backfill_fts() was the actual root cause — not FTS5 itself. It ran 1648 INSERTs on every init when schema_version failed to persist. 14 MCP processes × 1648 rows = permanent deadlock. Previous 3 hotfix commits (LOCK_SAFE, FTS5, PERF) treated symptoms, not cause.
[BUG] MCP wrapper divergence from inner API signatures. Auto-commit logger undefined in post-commit hook.
[WORKED] asyncio.gather for 4 independent I/O ops. JEPA 5-min TTL cache eliminates repeated computation.
Auto-generate MCP wrapper functions from schema to prevent parameter drift.
MCP wrapper divergence from inner API signatures. Auto-commit logger undefined in post-commit hook.
